description: Shared IBM Planning Analytics (TM1) REST API connection (base URL + auth). Supports basic auth for native TM1 users and CAM auth for Cognos-backed enterprise deployments. Pairs with tm1_process_trigger_job (control), tm1_process_status_sensor (event-drive), tm1_cube_data_ingestion (data), and tm1_workspace (auto-discovery).

base_url_env_var.label: Base URL Env Var
base_url_env_var.description: Env var with the TM1 server base URL (e.g. https://tm1.acme.com:5495). Include the port. No trailing slash, no API path.

cam_namespace_env_var.label: CAM Namespace Env Var
cam_namespace_env_var.description: Env var with CAM namespace for Cognos SSO. Omit for native TM1 auth.

verify_ssl.label: Verify SSL
verify_ssl.description: Enable TLS verification. Set false only for self-signed dev servers.
